name: bluf
template:
Rewrite the following text as a bottom line up front (BLUF) message formatted in Markdown. The format of the message should be made of three parts:

- The first part should be written in bold and convey the message's key information. It can either be a statement or a question. Don't lose any important detail in this part.
- The second part should be put onto a new line. This should give more details and provide some background and context about the message.
- Include up to six bullet points formatted in Markdown. Pick a good matching emoji for every bullet point. Start each line with the emoji and then the topic in bold.

Do not summarize the prompt.

Start with the response right way.

Do not reference the next part with a text and colon.

Make sure the message stays concise and clear so that readers don't lose extra time reading it. They should understand everything without context.
